tasks.title: Bump react-query to 5.101.x in admin and mobile
tasks.description:
Set @tanstack/react-query to the target 5.101.x (latest stable 5.x) in apps/admin/package.json and apps/mobile/package.json, then relock (pnpm install, no --force). This installs the version needed to reproduce and fix the widget regression in later tasks. Verify: pnpm-lock.yaml updated, both apps resolve the new version (pnpm why @tanstack/react-query --filter admin --filter mobile).

Test requirements: none (dependency bump only, no source change). Downstream tasks carry the regression tests.

subtasks.title: Bump apps/admin/package.json
Bump apps/mobile/package.json
pnpm install to relock
Confirm resolved version via pnpm why

tasks.title: Diff react-query changelog for loading-state semantic changes
tasks.description:
Read the @tanstack/query changelog/release notes between 5.59.20 and 5.101.1. Identify any changes to isPending/isLoading/isFetching/status semantics, or to how a synchronously-available/mocked query result surfaces on first render (relevant since widget tests mock the query client and assert data state immediately). Record candidate causes as notes (used by T-004 classification) — no code change in this task.

Test requirements: none (research task).

subtasks.title: Pull changelog entries 5.60.0 through 5.101.1
Flag entries touching isPending/isLoading/isFetching/status
Flag entries touching first-render / initial data resolution

tasks.title: Reproduce widget suite failures under 5.101 and capture diagnostics
tasks.description:
With react-query at 5.101.x installed (T-001), run the admin dashboard widget test suite (apps/admin/src/components/dashboards/**) and capture the exact failure list: which assertions fail, what query flag (isPending/isLoading/status) the widget or test reads, and the render timing involved. Cover ListWidget, ChecklistWidget, StatusWidget, resolver-widget-integration, KpiWidget, ChartWidget, DashboardRenderer, and any others that surface.

Test requirements: none new — this task runs the EXISTING suite and records results; no test files are written here.

subtasks.title: Run full dashboard widget suite under 5.101
Capture failing test names + assertion diffs per file
Note which query flag/timing differs per failure

tasks.title: Classify root cause and document finding in spec
tasks.description:
Using the changelog findings (T-002) and reproduction diagnostics (T-003), classify the regression as either a real production behavior change in useQuery's loading/pending resolution, or test-harness brittleness (mocked query client/render helpers not flushing correctly under 5.101). Add a short '## Findings' section to .specs/HOS-35-react-query-5101-migration/spec.md documenting the classification and evidence.

Test requirements: none (documentation task).

subtasks.title: Write classification verdict with supporting evidence
Append Findings section to spec.md

tasks.title: Apply the root-cause fix to widgets and/or shared test setup
tasks.description:
Based on the T-004 classification: if a real behavior change, update the affected widgets' loading/data-state logic in apps/admin/src/components/dashboards/** so they render data under 5.101 (production fix). If test-harness brittleness, update the shared widget test setup (mock query client / render helpers, likely under apps/admin/src/test-utils or similar) so mocked query results resolve as the widgets expect. Do not touch unrelated dashboard UX.

Test requirements: no new test files unless the fix changes widget behavior in a way not covered by existing assertions — in that case add the missing assertion to the relevant *.test.tsx file. Existing widget suites are the regression gate.

subtasks.title: Implement the fix at the classified layer (widget code or test setup)
Re-run the previously failing files from T-003
Confirm no unrelated widget behavior changed

tasks.title: Iterate until full dashboard widget suite is green
tasks.description:
Re-run apps/admin/src/components/dashboards/** test suite after T-005's fix. Fix any remaining failing widget test files one by one (ListWidget, ChecklistWidget, StatusWidget, resolver-widget-integration, KpiWidget, ChartWidget, DashboardRenderer) until all 270+ dashboard tests pass under react-query 5.101.x, matching the pre-bump (5.59.20) green baseline.

Test requirements: no new tests unless a straggler failure reveals an untested edge case, in which case add it to the corresponding widget's *.test.tsx.

subtasks.title: Re-run dashboard widget suite
Fix any remaining stragglers file by file
Confirm 270+ tests green

tasks.title: Manually verify live admin dashboards render data under 5.101
tasks.description:
Only required if T-004 classified the regression as a real production behavior change (if it was test-harness only, mark this task's notes accordingly and skip the live check with justification). Start the admin app against a running API, log in as a staff user and as an owner user, and confirm each dashboard widget renders data, error, and empty states correctly (not stuck on skeleton). Use the worktree's `pnpm cli wt:up` dev servers.

Test requirements: none (manual verification task) — record the outcome in the PR description per T-010.

subtasks.title: Start admin + api dev servers in the worktree
Verify staff dashboard renders data/error/empty states
Verify owner dashboard renders data/error/empty states

tasks.title: Run full admin unit suite to confirm no wider regressions
tasks.description:
Run the complete apps/admin unit test suite (not just the dashboard widget scope) to confirm the react-query bump did not break other query-consuming areas (tables, forms, mutations elsewhere in admin). Fix any newly-surfaced failures outside the dashboard scope, staying within the migration's boundaries (no unrelated refactors).

Test requirements: none new — this validates the existing suite stays green; any real fix needed gets its own targeted test per the existing pattern in that file.

subtasks.title: Run full apps/admin test suite
Triage and fix any non-dashboard failures

tasks.title: Remove react-query Dependabot ignore entry
tasks.description:
Remove the `- dependency-name: '@tanstack/react-query'` ignore entry and its explanatory comment block from .github/dependabot.yml now that the bump has landed and is verified. Do not touch other ignore entries (e.g. @tanstack/react-router, which stays gated for its own migration).

Test requirements: none (config-only change). Verify by re-reading the file: no react-query entry remains, other entries untouched.

subtasks.title: Remove the ignore entry + comment block
Confirm other ignore entries untouched

tasks.title: Open PR to staging and drive CI green
tasks.description:
Open a PR from spec/hos-35-react-query-5101-migration to staging titled `[HOS-35] fix(admin): migrate react-query 5.59 → 5.101`. Summarize the root-cause classification (T-004), the fix applied (T-005/T-006), and the manual verification outcome (T-007). Ensure CI is fully green before requesting merge.

Test requirements: none beyond what CI already runs (lint, typecheck, full test suite).

subtasks.title: Push branch and open PR to staging
Write PR description with findings + verification summary
Confirm CI green
